description_long: This object consists of a large wooden barrel mounted atop a sturdy, elevated wooden platform with cross-braced supports. The barrel is reinforced with two dark metal hoops and features a single round opening or bung on its side. The platform is supported by four angled legs, each reinforced with additional cross-bracing and metal bolts for stability. A simple wooden ladder leans against the platform, providing access to the barrel from the ground. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for holding and dispensing liquids in an urban or communal setting.
description: A large wooden barrel with metal hoops sits on a reinforced wooden platform, accessed by a ladder and supported by cross-braced legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's round opening, the platform, and the wooden ladder leading up to it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cross-braced supports and metal bolts on the legs, with the ladder visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the barrel and the platform, with no ladder or opening visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cross-bracing and bolts, with the ladder now on the right.
